required_skills: Subject matter competency and up-to-date practical or theoretical knowledge in the teaching discipline
Effective classroom instruction and lecture delivery for diverse student cohorts
Course material preparation including lecture slides, reading lists, case studies, and activity guides
Student assessment and feedback — designing and evaluating quizzes, assignments, and examinations
Student engagement and classroom management in both in-person and online learning environments
Learning Management System (LMS) usage for content upload, grade management, and student communication
Time management and professional reliability in meeting teaching schedules and submission deadlines
Commitment to continuous professional development and staying current in the discipline
preferred_skills: Postgraduate qualification (Master's or PhD) in the subject area or a closely related field
Prior lecturing, tutoring, or corporate training experience in formal or professional education settings
Familiarity with active learning techniques — think-pair-share, case discussions, peer instruction, and gamification
Experience developing digital or multimedia learning content for online or hybrid delivery
Industry or professional practice background that enriches applied examples within academic teaching
Understanding of inclusive education principles and strategies for supporting diverse learner needs
Basic instructional design knowledge and comfort with rapid content authoring tools
responsibilities: Deliver clear, engaging, and well-structured lectures, tutorials, and seminars across assigned modules, adapting teaching style to meet diverse student learning needs
Prepare comprehensive course materials — including lecture slides, annotated reading lists, case studies, practice problems, and supplementary resources — for each teaching session
Design and administer student assessments including in-class tests, assignments, projects, and examinations, ensuring alignment with stated module learning outcomes
Provide timely, constructive, and actionable written and verbal feedback on student submissions to support learning improvement and academic growth
Manage and update course content on the institutional LMS — uploading materials, posting announcements, moderating discussion forums, and recording attendance
Conduct scheduled student consultation hours and respond promptly to academic queries, providing guidance on course content, assessment preparation, and study strategies
Collaborate with module coordinators and senior faculty to ensure teaching content is consistent, current, and aligned across cohorts and delivery modes
Integrate real-world case studies, industry examples, and applied problem sets into lectures to bridge theoretical knowledge with practical relevance
Participate in departmental meetings, course review sessions, and professional development workshops as required by the academic department
Monitor student attendance, engagement, and academic performance trends, escalating at-risk cases to academic support services and faculty advisors proactively
